omitted_reason: The 2022 3-5 source PDF does not include a Separate Settings page; only Regular Education environments are reported.
notes: Source PDF contains only Regular Education environments (page 1 + page 2 LEP); there is no Separate Settings page. All separate-setting environments (separate_class, separate_school, residential_facility) are omitted from the CSV.
Several disability subgroup_total cells are suppressed (printed as '*'); subgroup_total is empty (NA) for those rows.
